title: StepSpec
description: A single execution step inside a skill. Each step invokes a capability or nested skill and wires dataflow via input/output mappings.

id.description: Unique step identifier within the skill (snake_case recommended).

uses.description: Capability ID to invoke (e.g. text.content.summarize) or 'skill:<skill_id>' for nested skill.

input.description: Input mapping: capability_field → source. Sources: inputs.X (skill input), vars.X (previous step output).

output.description: Output mapping: capability_field → target. Targets: vars.X (intermediate), outputs.X (skill output).

input_mapping.description: Alternative input mapping key (normalized at runtime).

output_mapping.description: Alternative output mapping key (normalized at runtime).

depends_on.description: Explicit DAG dependencies. Omit for sequential, use [] for parallel root.

condition.description: Expression that must evaluate truthy for step to execute.
